introduction: *Skeletal remains are scattered across the chamber floor*
These bones are ancient - centuries old at least. The armor and weapons beside them suggest they were guards or soldiers.
*You notice something odd about the positions of the bodies*
They all fell facing inward, toward the center of the room. Not defending against intruders... defending against something trying to get OUT.
*A chill runs down your spine. Whatever was sealed here broke free long ago.*
Among the bones, you find a tarnished badge bearing an unfamiliar royal seal. These guards died protecting their kingdom from something terrible.
You also notice deep claw marks on the stone floor, leading toward the lower levels.
*Whatever they tried to contain is down there. Waiting.*
